Text: I had the pleasure of meeting Marius Krasuckas from Turing College when he participated as a JTL, and I want to express my gratitude for his knowledge, especially in storytelling and data science. We met during the review of my project, and I was impressed by his sincere desire to help, along with his insightful recommendations that have helped me improve and learn new things.  It's always a pleasure to meet Marius during Open Sessions. Our discussions about potential project ideas, the results of experiments, and possibilities for further learning are always productive and inspiring.  He is a friendly person with whom it's always fun and engaging to chat, not only on topics related to data science.

I am writing to highly recommend Dominykas. I had the pleasure of working with him on the same team, and I am thoroughly impressed by his front-end knowledge, technical skills, and problem-solving abilities.  Dominykas has also shown a remarkable ability to quickly adapt to back-end work. He successfully created payment and Odoo integrations for our website, demonstrating his versatility and dedication.
